Home › Cheat Sheets › 2 Pointers Linkedlist

2 Pointers Linkedlist

Last updated: Oct 31, 2024

Table of Contents

  • 0-1) Types
  • 1) General form
  • 1-1) Basic OP
  • 2) LC Example
  • 2-1) Remove Duplicates from Sorted List

Two pointers - Linkedlist

  • Ref
    • fucking-algorithm : 2 pointers Linkedlist

0-1) Types

  • Pointer types
    • Fast - Slow pointers
      • fast, slow pointers from same start point
      • Usualy set
        • slow pointer moves 1 idx
        • fast pointer moves 2 idx
      • linked list
        • find mid point of linked list
        • check if linked list is circular
          • LC 141
          • LC 142
        • if a circular linked list, return beginning point of circular
        • find last k elements of a single linked list
          • LC 19 : Remove Nth Node From End of List

1) General form

1-1) Basic OP

1-1-1 : Check if there is a circular linked list

1// java
2boolean hasCycle(ListNode head){
3    fast = slow = head;
4    // NOTE : while loop condition
5    while (fast != null and fast.next != null){
6        /** NOTE : need to do move slow, fast pointer then compare them */
7        slow = slow.next;
8        fast = fast.next.next;
9        if (fast == slow){
10            return True
11        }
12    }
13    return False;
14}

1-1-2 : return the “ring start point” of circular linked list

1// java
2// LC 141
3ListNode detectCycle(ListNode head){
4    ListNode fast, slow;
5    fast = slow = head;
6    while (fast != null and fast.next != null){
7        /** NOTE !!! We move pointers first */
8        fast = fast.next.next;
9        slow = slow.next;
10        if (fast == slow){
11            break;
12        }
13    }
14    slow = head;
15    // may need below logic to check whether is cycle linked list or not
16    // if (! fast or ! fast.next){
17    //     return null;
18    // }
19    while (slow != fast){
20        slow = slow.next;
21        fast = fast.next;
22    }
23    return slow;
24}

1# LC 142. Linked List Cycle II
2# python
3class Solution:
4    def detectCycle(self, head):
5        if not head or not head.next:
6            return
7        slow = fast = head
8        while fast and fast.next:
9            fast = fast.next.next
10            slow = slow.next
11            if fast == slow:
12                break
13        #print ("slow = " + str(slow) + " fast = " + str(fast))
14        ### NOTE : via below condition check if is a cycle linked list
15        if not fast or not fast.next:
16            return
17        """
18        ### NOTE : re-init slow or fast as head (from starting point)
19        -> can init slow or head
20        """
21        slow = head
22        #fast = head 
23        """
24        ### NOTE : check while slow != fast
25        ### NOTE : use the same speed
26        """
27        while slow != fast:
28            # NOTE this !!! : fast, slow move SAME speed (in this step)
29            fast = fast.next
30            slow = slow.next
31        return slow
32
33# V0'
34# IDEA : SET
35class Solution(object):
36    def detectCycle(self, head):
37        if not head or not head.next:
38            return
39        s = set()
40        while head:
41            s.add(head)
42            head = head.next
43            if head in s:
44                return head
45        return

1-1-3 : find mid point of a single linked list

1// java
2while (fast != null and fast.next != null){
3    fast = fast.next.next;
4    slow = slow.next;
5}
6return slow;

1-1-4 : find last k elements in a single linked list

1// java
2ListNode fast, slow;
3slow = fast = head;
4while (k > 0){
5    fast = fast.next;
6    k -= 1;
7}
8while (fast != null){
9    fast = fast.next;
10    slow = slow.next;
11}
12return slow;

2) LC Example

2-1) Remove Duplicates from Sorted List

1// LC 83 (LC 26)
2// https://labuladong.online/algo/essential-technique/array-two-pointers-summary/#%E5%8E%9F%E5%9C%B0%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9
3class Solution {
4    public ListNode deleteDuplicates(ListNode head) {
5        if (head == null) return null;
6        ListNode slow = head, fast = head;
7        while (fast != null) {
8            if (fast.val != slow.val) {
9                // nums[slow] = nums[fast];
10                slow.next = fast;
11                // slow++;
12                slow = slow.next;
13            }
14            // fast++
15            fast = fast.next;
16        }
17        // 断开与后面重复元素的连接
18        slow.next = null;
19        return head;
20    }
21}
